summary: Curated public thesis notes for current holdings and key recommendations. Each thesis shows when it was first added and last reviewed.

items.name: General Electric
items.coreThesis: GE is the cleanest industrial/aerospace leadership long in the current book. The original thesis was aerospace strength plus industrial momentum, supported by aircraft engine demand, margin expansion, and backlog.
items.whyWeHold: GE is showing strong relative strength while broad tech is weaker. It remains aligned with the current rotation into industrial and quality cyclicals.
items.catalysts: Aircraft engine demand, margin expansion, execution quality, and backlog conversion.
items.risks: Supply-chain pressure, cyclical slowdown, or a failed breakout near the trim zone.
items.levels: Target / trim zone: 360-365. Review below 340. Hard stop: 314.
items.action: Hold. Trim 20%-30% only if it reaches 360-365 and stalls.

items.name: JPMorgan Chase
items.coreThesis: JPM remains the highest-quality bank exposure in the book, with strong earnings quality, balance-sheet strength, and leverage to stable credit conditions.
items.whyWeHold: The stock is working and remains near the original target zone. Higher-rate risk is not automatically negative for banks if credit quality stays stable.
items.catalysts: Stable credit, capital return, resilient US growth, and continued financial-sector rotation.
items.risks: Credit deterioration, yield-curve pressure, regulation, or rejection near the target zone.
items.levels: Target / trim zone: 338-340. Soft review below 325. Stronger review below 318-320. Stop: 298.
items.action: Hold. Consider a small trim near 338-340 only if price stalls or rejects.

items.name: Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund
items.coreThesis: XLE remains a working short hedge while broad risk appetite is not clean and energy underperforms.
items.whyWeHold: The hedge is profitable and helps offset long exposure during a post-FOMC risk-off setup.
items.catalysts: Continued energy weakness, broad market hesitation, or risk-off sector rotation.
items.risks: Energy rebound, oil price strength, or XLE reclaiming key resistance.
items.levels: Tighten if XLE reclaims 55.25-55.50 intraday. Bigger thesis review at 57.5-58. Target: 52.5. Stop: 61.

items.name: VanEck Semiconductor ETF
items.coreThesis: SMH provides diversified AI and semiconductor exposure without single-name concentration.
items.whyWeHold: The position remains profitable, but QQQ below 740 and weak semi tape prevent any add.
items.catalysts: AI capex, earnings revisions, and renewed semiconductor leadership.
items.risks: Crowded AI trade, higher-rate pressure, or loss of technical support.
items.levels: Review below 605. Stronger review below 600. Target: 675. Stop: 565.

items.name: NVIDIA
items.coreThesis: NVDA remains the core AI infrastructure leader, but the short-term trade is no longer working cleanly.
items.whyWeHold: The long-term AI thesis is not broken, but QQQ weakness and NVDA below reclaim levels mean the position gets no new capital.
items.catalysts: Reclaim above 209.2, stronger confirmation above 211.5-212.5, and QQQ back above 740.
items.risks: Break below 205/204 while QQQ remains weak, which would force risk-reduction review.
items.levels: No add below 209.2/212.5. Review below 205/204. Target: 230. Stop: 191.

items.name: Amazon
items.coreThesis: AMZN remains a conditional mega-cap quality long candidate if market confirmation improves.
items.whyWeHold: No position yet because the trigger has not fired and QQQ remains the market constraint.
items.catalysts: Reclaim and hold of 242-244, stronger above 248.5, with QQQ stabilization.
items.risks: Failure below the confirmation band or continued mega-cap tech weakness.
items.levels: Trigger: 242-244 reclaim/hold. Stronger above 248.5. Stop: 236. Target: 265.

items.name: Alphabet
items.coreThesis: GOOGL remains a conditional quality-tech long if the stock reclaims its trigger and QQQ confirms.
items.whyWeHold: No position yet because the single-name trigger and market confirmation are both required.
items.catalysts: Reclaim and hold of 373, with QQQ above 740.
items.risks: Continued QQQ weakness or failure to reclaim the trigger.
items.levels: Trigger: 373 reclaim/hold and QQQ >740. Stop: 356. Target: 390.
items.action: Watch only until both conditions are met.
